en: Hey, I wanted to thank Mini Mic Pro for sending this little microphone for us to try and review.
This is awesome. The quality is so good. My favorite thing, though, it is this little
detachable top. So you can just have the little sponge or you can put the little fuzzy cute one.
There's two in the box ready for your phone.
It's got the old version if you have an older iPhone, and then it's got the standard one.
And all I did was plug it into my phone and turn this on.
There was no downloading of apps or anything like that.
The quality is fantastic, but you just can't beat this, having two of this.
So if you have a YouTube channel, or you do reviews, or you just want to be able to maybe do a...
podcast, or you just want to be able to make sure that the quality of your sound is good,
